segments.text: I waited patiently for the LORD; he inclined to me and heard my cry.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: I waited…: Heb. In waiting I waited

segments.text: He drew me up from the pit of destruction, out of the miry bog,
and set my feet upon a rock, making my steps secure.

footnotes: an…: Heb. a pit of noise

segments.text: He put a new song in my mouth, a song of praise to our God.
Many will see and fear, and put their trust in the LORD.
Blessed is the man who makes the LORD his trust, who does not turn to the proud, to those who go astray after a lie!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have multiplied, O LORD my God, your wondrous deeds and your thoughts toward us; none can compare with you! I will proclaim and tell of them, yet they are more than can be told.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: they cannot…: or, none can order them unto thee

segments.text: In sacrifice and offering you have not delighted, but you have given me an open ear.
Burnt offering and sin offering you have not required.
Then I said, 'Behold, I have come; in the scroll of the book it is written of me:
segments.speaker: David/Christ

segments.text: I delight to do your will, O my God; your law is within my heart.'
segments.speaker: David/Christ

footnotes: within…: Heb. in the midst of my bowels

segments.text: I have told the glad news of deliverance in the great congregation; behold, I have not restrained my lips, as you know, O LORD.
I have not hidden your deliverance within my heart; I have spoken of your faithfulness and your salvation; I have not concealed your steadfast love and your faithfulness from the great congregation.
As for you, O LORD, you will not restrain your mercy from me; your steadfast love and your faithfulness will ever preserve me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For evils have encompassed me beyond number; my iniquities have overtaken me, and I cannot see; they are more than the hairs of my head; my heart faileth me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let those be put to shame and disappointed altogether who seek to snatch away my life; let those be turned back and brought to dishonor who desire my hurt!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let those be appalled because of their shame who say to me, 'Aha, Aha!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But may all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you; may those who love your salvation say continually, 'Great is the LORD!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: As for me, I am poor and needy, but the Lord takes thought for me. You are my help and my deliverer; do not delay, O my God!
segments.speaker: David
